req.title: Reconciliation report (negative variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest test suite for Daily Reconciliation Report requirements.

Requirements covered:
1. System produces a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank
2. Non-zero variance opens an incident
3. Negative paths: insufficient funds, unauthorised access, exceeded limits
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code interfaces assumed – adjust imports as needed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class IncidentSeverity(Enum):
    LOW = "LOW"
    MEDIUM = "MEDIUM"
    HIGH = "HIGH"
    CRITICAL = "CRITICAL"


class IncidentStatus(Enum):
    OPEN = "OPEN"
    ACKNOWLEDGED = "ACKNOWLEDGED"
    RESOLVED = "RESOLVED"


class ReconciliationStatus(Enum):
    MATCHED = "MATCHED"
    VARIANCE_DETECTED = "VARIANCE_DETECTED"
    FAILED = "FAILED"


@dataclass
class LedgerEntry:
    transaction_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str
    timestamp: datetime
    description: str


@dataclass
class BankStatement:
    transaction_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str
    timestamp: datetime
    reference: str


@dataclass
class ReconciliationReport:
    report_id: str
    report_date: date
    internal_balance: Decimal
    correspondent_balance: Decimal
    variance: Decimal
    status: ReconciliationStatus
    unmatched_ledger_entries: list
    unmatched_bank_entries: list
    generated_at: datetime
    incident_id: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Incident:
    incident_id: str
    report_id: str
    variance_amount: Decimal
    severity: IncidentSeverity
    status: IncidentStatus
    opened_at: datetime
    description: str


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def mock_ledger_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_bank_connector():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_incident_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_report_repository():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_notification_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def reconciliation_service(
    mock_ledger_service,
    mock_bank_connector,
    mock_incident_service,
    mock_report_repository,
    mock_notification_service,
):
    """
    Construct the system-under-test with all dependencies injected as mocks.
    Replace the import path with your actual module location.
    """
    from reconciliation.service import ReconciliationService  # noqa: PLC0415

    return ReconciliationService(
        ledger_service=mock_ledger_service,
        bank_connector=mock_bank_connector,
        incident_service=mock_incident_service,
        report_repository=mock_report_repository,
        notification_service=mock_notification_service,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def report_date():
    return date(2024, 6, 15)


@pytest.fixture
def balanced_ledger_entries():
    return [
        LedgerEntry("TXN-001", Decimal("1000.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 9, 0), "Wire transfer"),
        LedgerEntry("TXN-002", Decimal("250.50"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 10, 30), "ACH credit"),
        LedgerEntry("TXN-003", Decimal("-500.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 14, 0), "Payment out"),
    ]


@pytest.fixture
def balanced_bank_entries():
    return [
        BankStatement("TXN-001", Decimal("1000.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 9, 1), "REF-001"),
        BankStatement("TXN-002", Decimal("250.50"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 10, 31), "REF-002"),
        BankStatement("TXN-003", Decimal("-500.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 14, 1), "REF-003"),
    ]


@pytest.fixture
def mismatched_bank_entries():
    """Bank shows a different balance – creates a variance."""
    return [
        BankStatement("TXN-001", Decimal("1000.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 9, 1), "REF-001"),
        BankStatement("TXN-002", Decimal("300.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 10, 31), "REF-002"),  # +49.50 diff
        BankStatement("TXN-003", Decimal("-500.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15, 14, 1), "REF-003"),
    ]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper builders
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _make_report(
    variance: Decimal,
    status: ReconciliationStatus = ReconciliationStatus.MATCHED,
    internal: Decimal = Decimal("750.50"),
    incident_id: Optional[str] = None,
) -> ReconciliationReport:
    return ReconciliationReport(
        report_id="RPT-2024-06-15",
        report_date=date(2024, 6, 15),
        internal_balance=internal,
        correspondent_balance=internal + variance,
        variance=variance,
        status=status,
        unmatched_ledger_entries=[],
        unmatched_bank_entries=[],
        generated_at=datetime(2024, 6, 15, 23, 59, 59),
        incident_id=incident_id,
    )


def _make_incident(variance: Decimal, severity: IncidentSeverity = IncidentSeverity.HIGH) -> Incident:
    return Incident(
        incident_id="INC-20240615-001",
        report_id="RPT-2024-06-15",
        variance_amount=variance,
        severity=severity,
        status=IncidentStatus.OPEN,
        opened_at=datetime(2024, 6, 15, 23, 59, 59),
        description=f"Reconciliation variance of {variance} USD detected",
    )


# ===========================================================================
# 1. REPORT GENERATION – HAPPY PATH
# ===========================================================================

class TestDailyReconciliationReportGeneration:
    """System shall produce a daily reconciliation report."""

    def test_report_is_generated_for_given_date(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_report_repository, balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries
        mock_report_repository.save.return_value = None

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report is not None
        assert report.report_date == report_date

    def test_report_contains_internal_ledger_balance(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        expected_internal = sum(e.amount for e in balanced_ledger_entries)
        assert report.internal_balance == expected_internal

    def test_report_contains_correspondent_bank_balance(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        expected_bank = sum(e.amount for e in balanced_bank_entries)
        assert report.correspondent_balance == expected_bank

    def test_report_is_persisted_to_repository(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_report_repository, balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_report_repository.save.assert_called_once()
        saved_report = mock_report_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_report.report_date == report_date

    def test_report_has_unique_report_id(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        report1 = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(date(2024, 6, 14))
        report2 = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(date(2024, 6, 15))

        assert report1.report_id != report2.report_id

    def test_report_generation_timestamp_is_recorded(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        before = datetime.utcnow()
        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)
        after = datetime.utcnow()

        assert before <= report.generated_at <= after

    def test_report_queries_ledger_with_correct_date(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.assert_called_once_with(report_date)

    def test_report_queries_bank_connector_with_correct_date(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.assert_called_once_with(report_date)

    def test_report_status_matched_when_zero_variance(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.status == ReconciliationStatus.MATCHED
        assert report.variance == Decimal("0.00")

    def test_report_with_empty_entries_shows_zero_balances(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = []
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = []

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.internal_balance == Decimal("0.00")
        assert report.correspondent_balance == Decimal("0.00")
        assert report.variance == Decimal("0.00")


# ===========================================================================
# 2. VARIANCE DETECTION AND INCIDENT CREATION
# ===========================================================================

class TestVarianceDetectionAndIncidentCreation:
    """Non-zero variance shall open an incident."""

    def test_non_zero_variance_opens_incident(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        expected_variance = Decimal("49.50")
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(expected_variance)

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_zero_variance_does_not_open_incident(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, balanced_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = balanced_bank_entries

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_report_references_incident_id_when_opened(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        incident = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.incident_id == incident.incident_id

    def test_incident_contains_correct_variance_amount(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        call_kwargs = mock_incident_service.open_incident.call_args
        assert call_kwargs[1].get("variance_amount") == Decimal("49.50") or \
               call_kwargs[0][0] == Decimal("49.50")  # positional or keyword

    def test_incident_status_is_open_immediately(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        incident = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert incident.status == IncidentStatus.OPEN

    def test_report_status_is_variance_detected_when_mismatch(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.status == ReconciliationStatus.VARIANCE_DETECTED

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("variance,expected_severity", [
        (Decimal("0.01"), IncidentSeverity.LOW),
        (Decimal("999.99"), IncidentSeverity.LOW),
        (Decimal("1000.00"), IncidentSeverity.MEDIUM),
        (Decimal("9999.99"), IncidentSeverity.MEDIUM),
        (Decimal("10000.00"), IncidentSeverity.HIGH),
        (Decimal("99999.99"), IncidentSeverity.HIGH),
        (Decimal("100000.00"), IncidentSeverity.CRITICAL),
        (Decimal("1000000.00"), IncidentSeverity.CRITICAL),
    ])
    def test_incident_severity_scales_with_variance(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, report_date, variance, expected_severity,
    ):
        internal = Decimal("500000.00")
        ledger = [LedgerEntry("T1", internal, "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "base")]
        bank = [BankStatement("T1", internal + variance, "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "R1")]

        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = ledger
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = bank
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(variance, expected_severity)

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        call_kwargs = mock_incident_service.open_incident.call_args
        actual_severity = (
            call_kwargs[1].get("severity")
            or call_kwargs[0][1]  # positional fallback
        )
        assert actual_severity == expected_severity

    def test_negative_variance_also_opens_incident(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, report_date,
    ):
        """Bank shows less than internal ledger – still a non-zero variance."""
        internal = Decimal("1000.00")
        ledger = [LedgerEntry("T1", internal, "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "credit")]
        bank = [BankStatement("T1", Decimal("900.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "R1")]

        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = ledger
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = bank
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(Decimal("-100.00"))

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_incident_description_references_report_id(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        incident = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.report_id in incident.description or report.report_id == incident.report_id

    def test_unmatched_entries_listed_in_report(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, report_date,
    ):
        """Entries present in ledger but absent from bank statement appear as unmatched."""
        ledger = [
            LedgerEntry("TXN-A", Decimal("500.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "payment"),
            LedgerEntry("TXN-B", Decimal("200.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "orphan"),  # no bank match
        ]
        bank = [
            BankStatement("TXN-A", Decimal("500.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "REF-A"),
        ]
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = ledger
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = bank
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(Decimal("200.00"))

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert any(e.transaction_id == "TXN-B" for e in report.unmatched_ledger_entries)

    def test_notification_sent_when_incident_opened(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, mock_notification_service,
        balanced_ledger_entries, mismatched_bank_entries, report_date,
    ):
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced_ledger_entries
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = mismatched_bank_entries
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = _make_incident(Decimal("49.50"))

        reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        mock_notification_service.send_incident_alert.assert_called_once()


# ===========================================================================
# 3. NEGATIVE PATH – INSUFFICIENT FUNDS
# ===========================================================================

class TestInsufficientFundsNegativePath:
    """Transactions that fail due to insufficient funds shall be captured correctly."""

    def test_insufficient_funds_transaction_rejected(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_bank_connector,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError(
            "Account balance insufficient for transaction amount"
        )

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                amount=Decimal("50000.00"),
                currency="USD",
            )

    def test_insufficient_funds_transaction_is_not_posted_to_ledger(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_bank_connector, mock_ledger_service,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError("NSF")

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                amount=Decimal("9999999.00"),
                currency="USD",
            )

        mock_ledger_service.post_entry.assert_not_called()

    def test_insufficient_funds_does_not_create_variance(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_service, mock_bank_connector,
        mock_incident_service, report_date,
    ):
        """A rejected NSF payment should leave both sides balanced."""
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError("NSF")
        balanced = [LedgerEntry("T1", Decimal("100.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "ok")]
        mock_ledger_service.get_entries_for_date.return_value = balanced
        mock_bank_connector.get_statement_for_date.return_value = [
            BankStatement("T1", Decimal("100.00"), "USD", datetime(2024, 6, 15), "R1")
        ]

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment("ACC-001", Decimal("99999.00"), "USD")

        report = reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(report_date)

        assert report.variance == Decimal("0.00")
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_insufficient_funds_error_contains_account_and_amount(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_bank_connector,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError(
            "Insufficient funds: balance 100.00 < requested 5000.00"
        )

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError, match="100.00"):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment("ACC-001", Decimal("5000.00"), "USD")

    def test_partial_batch_with_nsf_rolls_back_entire_batch(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_bank_connector, mock_ledger_service,
    ):
        """If one payment in a batch is NSF, the whole batch must be rolled back."""
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        payments = [
            {"account_id": "ACC-001", "amount": Decimal("100.00"), "currency": "USD"},
            {"account_id": "ACC-002", "amount": Decimal("9999999.00"), "currency": "USD"},  # NSF
            {"account_id": "ACC-003", "amount": Decimal("200.00"), "currency": "USD"},
        ]

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = [
            None,
            InsufficientFundsError("NSF on second payment"),
        ]

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment_batch(payments)

        mock_ledger_service.rollback_batch.assert_called_once()

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("available,requested", [
        (Decimal("0.00"), Decimal("0.01")),
        (Decimal("99.99"), Decimal("100.00")),
        (Decimal("999.00"), Decimal("1000.00")),
    ])
    def test_nsf_boundary_cases(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_bank_connector, available, requested,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import InsufficientFundsError  # noqa: PLC0415

        mock_bank_connector.execute_payment.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError(
            f"Balance {available} insufficient for {requested}"
        )

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            reconciliation_service.execute_payment("ACC-001", requested, "USD")


# ===========================================================================
# 4. NEGATIVE PATH – UNAUTHORISED ACCESS
# ===========================================================================

class TestUnauthorisedAccessNegativePath:
    """Unauthorised requests shall be rejected before touching ledger or bank."""

    def test_unauthorised_user_cannot_generate_report(
        self, reconciliation_service,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import UnauthorisedError  # noqa: PLC0415

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError):
            reconciliation_service.generate_daily_report(
                report_date=date(2024, 6, 15),
                requesting_user_role="VIEWER",  # insufficient role
            )

    def test_unauthorised_user_cannot_view_report(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_report_repository,
    ):
        from reconciliation.exceptions import UnauthorisedError  # noqa: PLC0415

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError):
            reconciliation_service.get_report(

"""
Pytest test suite for Daily Reconciliation Report requirements.

Requirements covered:
1. System produces a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank
2. Non-zero variance opens an incident
3. Negative paths: insufficient funds, unauthorised access, exceeded limits
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code interfaces assumed – adjust imports as needed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class IncidentSeverity(Enum):
    LOW = "LOW"
    MEDIUM = "MEDIUM"
    HIGH = "HIGH"
    CRITICAL = "CRITICAL"


class IncidentStatus(Enum):
    OPEN = "OPEN"
    ACKNOWLEDGED = "ACKNOWLEDGED"
    RESOLVED = "RESOLVED"


class ReconciliationStatus(Enum):
    MATCHED = "MATCHED"
    VARIANCE_DETECTED = "VARIANCE_DETECTED"
    FAILED = "FAILED"


@dataclass
class LedgerEntry:
    transaction_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str
    timestamp: datetime
    description: str


@dataclass
class BankStatement:
    transaction_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str
    timestamp: datetime
    reference: str


@dataclass
class ReconciliationReport:
    report_id: str
    report_date: date
    internal_balance: Decimal
    correspondent_balance: Decimal
    variance: Decimal
    status: ReconciliationStatus
    unmatched_ledger_entries: list
    unmatched_bank_entries: list
    generated_at: datetime
    incident_id: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class Incident:
    incident_id: str
    report_id: str
    variance_amount: Decimal
    severity: IncidentSeverity
    status: IncidentStatus
    opened_at: datetime
    description: str
